title: Link against Ulala
description:
I MOVED!! CLICK HERE!! 
http://www.youtube.com/user/PennazProductions

---------------------------------------------

I wanted so damn much to use the "chroma keyer" of Sony Vegas at least once...
...plus, since the day I discovered Space Channel 5 I desired to make something based on it...

...there it is... ...my dreams are now true!
Awwwww, I'm so touched that ''m crying tears of joy...  (not)

-------------------------------

I animated Link with Artoonix, edited his voice with Audacity, cleaned the backgrounds with photoshop and pot all togheter with Sony Vegas pro 8.0.

-------------------------------

Space Channel 5 is a rhythm game for Dreamcast and Playstation 2.
In every stage you have to copy the moves (up, down, shoot, etc...) of your opponent by following the rhythm. 

Easy to get, tricky to do at times!

-------------------------------

The song is called "Attack of the perfect reporter"!
There it is: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qTmdJkZskaI

The gameplay footage I used was uploaded by neverlando on YouTube!
There the original video: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qTmdJkZskaI

-------------------------------

I'm not the first who make something based on this stage! 
Check them out too!

- Space Fortress 5: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HvoiyltNgGk&feature=related

- Space Channel Robotnik: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F3GZDq8RSdw&feature=related
